Personal

The Creator

Creativity and personal autonomy are the foundations of a meaningful life. Through music, fiction, and ideas — exploring what it means to think freely.

🎸 Music

Guitar, electronic music, songwriting, and AI-revitalized productions. A creative journey from college to today.

💡 Ideas & Philosophy

📖 Fiction & Fantasy

Epic fantasy trilogies, sci-fi novels, and stories exploring the intersections of technology, humanity, and imagination.

The beginning of an epic fantasy trilogy.
